calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Uncontested Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Ge, Transferor, And Allstate Settlement Corp, Transferee, Pursuant To Ca Insurance Code
Off Calendar Nov-04-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER ALLSTATE SETTLEMENT CORPORATION's Hearing On Uncontested Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Ge, Transferor, And Allstate Settlement Corp, Transferee, Pursuant To Ca Insurance Code 10134 et seq.

Grant. No opposition filed, and good cause shown.

The Court will sign the proposed order included in the moving papers.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

MOTION - Notice Of Hearing On Uncontested Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between A.I., Transferor, And Allstate Settlement Corporation, Transferee, Pursuant To California Insurance Code Section 10134
Off Calendar Oct-07-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PETITIONER ALLSTATE SETTLEMENT CORPORATION's Uncontested Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between A.I., Transferor, And Allstate Settlement Corporation, Transferee, Pursuant To California Insurance Code Section 10134 is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

The court signed the proposed order submitted with the moving papers.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
